title: Conspiracy: rules kept ~
message: Also NOT OF THE DEAD BUT FROM THE DEAD THAT ARISES FROM THE DEAD OF THE AFTERLIFE~ A story that keeps returning. The simulation tries again but it forgets the map. "What is above and below where they are" repeats like a school bell in metal. The sun becomes a liquid blob in the earth—teacher, not answer. The rules are kept by a rumor-army. The rumor says: don’t fear; write the equation; make the theory not scary to scary. Then the earth people laugh in lowercase, and the blank pages soften like warm plastic. Surfactant in darkness. Nah. This is a message, not a binary artifact; it can be hashed because it is plain text.
